TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Minsiong śįĎťõĄ Minsiong (Paywan binacadan a kamu: Balai, nalecuhan i 1970 a mihcaan 6 a bulad 9 a demiad). Taywan mudadiway, mipalaway, namakay i Pingtung sian Sici siang Silu niyazu', u Paywan binacadan a tademaw. naayaway a ngangan: ci Lee minsiong. malimula' a nganganňź ci Minsiong ke. kanatal: Conghuaminko. binacadan: Paywan. nalecu i Taywan Pingtung sian Sici siang. nalecuhan i 1970 a mihcaan 6 a bulad 9 a demiad. kawaw niza: mudadiway, mipalaway, mitelungay, misanga' tu dadiw. misanga' tu palaw. matinengay a kamu: Hulam, Paywan, Taywan. pahezek a cacudadan: Pingtung kawkung. nalimaan: kalimucu' sakapitu . siwkay niza Minsiong i kawcung henay sa, mudadiwtu i Pingtung, Kaosiung. sisa, matinengtu katuuday ku mipalaway a tademaw. nalimaan nu dadiw pulungan a nalimaan:"mududu' tu bulad Ť∑üŤĎóśúąšļģŤĶį"(1999 a mihcaan palekal) teked a nalimaan:"maazih tu cilal ÁúčŤ¶čŚ§™ťôĹ"(2001 a mihcaan)(aci wanposen,Lincyayi,Coyun pulung mudadiw) teked a nalimaan:"sicedamay a luma' ÁĒúŤúúÁöĄŚģ∂"(2008 a mihcaan) adidi'ay a nalimaan:"Less and MoreśįĎťõĄŚ∑īŤźä"(2012 a mihcaan palekal) iga 2008 a mihcaan "kalimucu' sakapitu"(mipalaw ci Malaw) 2012 a mihcaan"pakuyucay a tademaw" 2017 a mihcaan"52 Hz I Love You" tilibi Taywan tilibi(2001 a mihcaan)- u ngangan aku ci Lianhua śąĎÁöĄŚźćŚ≠óŚŹęŤďģŤäĪ Yincumincu tilibi(2005 a mihcaan)- miadupay Yincumincu tilibi(2009 a mihcaan)- misaydan i Lanyu Binawlan tilibi(2009 a mihcaan)- kakasenengan ÁóěŚ≠źŤčĪťõĄ Manamuh tilibi(2010 a mihcaan)- muwa atu kilang Taywan tilibi(2011 a mihcaan)- kakasenengan i umah ÁĒįŚļĄŤčĪťõĄ Manamuh tilibi(2012 a mihcaan)- buyu ŚĪĪRXAY Sanli tilibi(2013 a mihcaan)- maymaw takuwanan ŚįĪśėĮŤ¶ĀšĹ†śĄõšłäśąĎ Sanli tilibi(2014 a mihcaan)- ÁÜĪśĶ∑śąÄś≠Ć limulak tilibi(2015 a mihcaan)-PMAMšĻčśÖĺśúõšŅĪś®āťÉ® Tademaw tilibi(2015 a mihcaan)-śėüŚļßśĄõśÉÖÁ≥ĽŚąó Taywan tilibi(2016 a mihcaan)- ŚŅÖŚčĚÁ∑īÁŅíÁĒü Taywan tilibi(2016 a mihcaan)- ) nalimaan nu mitelungay misalukyaw ku Tuas śźĖśĽĺÁ•ĖťĚą kapah tu TaywanŚŹįÁĀ£ÁúüŚ•ĹŚļ∑ palud ni ina Ś™ĹŚ™ĹÁöĄŚĽöśąŅ tansul sa singangan tuway nuayaway a simpi cacekulan ŚéüŚ§ĘŤąěŚŹį u zuma ku kapah nu palaw Á∂úŤóĚŤŹ≤ŚłłŤģö Á¨¨5~9ťõÜŚä©ÁźÜšłĽśĆĀ
S.PHON: minsioŇč ** minsioŇč (pajwan bina ¶adan a kamu: bar~…ĺai, nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad). tajwan mudadiwaj, mipar~…ĺawaj, namakaj i piŇčtuŇč sian si ¶i siaŇč sir~…ĺu nijazu Ē~ °, u pajwan bina ¶adan a tad…ômaw. naajawaj a ŇčaŇčan: ¶i r~…ĺ…ô…ô minsioŇč. mar~…ĺimur~…ĺa Ē~ ° a ŇčaŇčan* ¶i minsioŇč k…ô. kanatar~…ĺ: ¶oŇčńßuaminko. bina ¶adan: pajwan. nar~…ĺ…ô ¶u i tajwan piŇčtuŇč sian si ¶i siaŇč. nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad. kawaw niza: mudadiwaj, mipar~…ĺawaj, mit…ôr~…ĺuŇčaj, misaŇča Ē~ ° tu dadiw. misaŇča Ē~ ° tu par~…ĺaw. matin…ôŇčaj a kamu: ńßur~…ĺam, pajwan, tajwan. pańß…ôz…ôk a ¶a ¶udadan: piŇčtuŇč kawkuŇč. nar~…ĺimaan: kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° sakapitu . siwkaj niza minsioŇč i kaw ¶uŇč ńß…ônaj sa, mudadiwtu i piŇčtuŇč, kaosiuŇč. sisa, matin…ôŇčtu katuudaj ku mipar~…ĺawaj a tad…ômaw. nar~…ĺimaan nu dadiw pur~…ĺuŇčan a nar~…ĺimaan:"mududu Ē~ ° tu bur~…ĺad *****"(**** a mińß ¶aan par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ) t…ôk…ôd a nar~…ĺimaan:"maazińß tu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ ****"(**** a mińß ¶aan)(a ¶i wanpos…ôn,r~…ĺin ¶jaji, ¶ojun pur~…ĺuŇč mudadiw) t…ôk…ôd a nar~…ĺimaan:"si ¶…ôdamaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ****"(**** a mińß ¶aan) adidi Ē~ °aj a nar~…ĺimaan:"r~…ĺ…ôss and mor…ô****"(**** a mińß ¶aan par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ) iga **** a mińß ¶aan "kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° sakapitu"(mipar~…ĺaw ¶i mar~…ĺaw) **** a mińß ¶aan"pakuju ¶aj a tad…ômaw" **** a mińß ¶aan"** ńßz i r~…ĺo*…ô jou" tir~…ĺibi tajwan tir~…ĺibi(**** a mińß ¶aan)- u ŇčaŇčan aku ¶i r~…ĺianńßua ******* jin ¶umin ¶u tir~…ĺibi(**** a mińß ¶aan)- miadupaj jin ¶umin ¶u tir~…ĺibi(**** a mińß ¶aan)- misajdan i r~…ĺanju binawr~…ĺan tir~…ĺibi(**** a mińß ¶aan)- kakas…ôn…ôŇčan **** manamuńß tir~…ĺibi(**** a mińß ¶aan)- muwa atu kir~…ĺaŇč tajwan tir~…ĺibi(**** a mińß ¶aan)- kakas…ôn…ôŇčan i umańß **** manamuńß tir~…ĺibi(**** a mińß ¶aan)- buju ***aj sanr~…ĺi tir~…ĺibi(**** a mińß ¶aan)- majmaw takuwanan ******* sanr~…ĺi tir~…ĺibi(**** a mińß ¶aan)- **** r~…ĺimur~…ĺak tir~…ĺibi(**** a mińß ¶aan)-pmam****** tad…ômaw tir~…ĺibi(**** a mińß ¶aan)-****** tajwan tir~…ĺibi(**** a mińß ¶aan)- ***** tajwan tir~…ĺibi(**** a mińß ¶aan)- ) nar~…ĺimaan nu mit…ôr~…ĺuŇčaj misar~…ĺukjaw ku tuas **** kapańß tu tajwan***** par~…ĺud ni ina ***** tansur~…ĺ sa siŇčaŇčan tuwaj nuajawaj a simpi ¶a ¶…ôkur~…ĺan **** u zuma ku kapańß nu par~…ĺaw ***** **~******
S.FORM: Minsiong śįĎťõĄ Minsiong (Paywan binacadan a kamu: Balai, nalecuhan i 1970 a mihcaan 6 a bulad 9 a demiad). Taywan mudadiway, mipalaway, namakay i Pingtung sian Sici siang Silu niyazu', u Paywan binacadan a tademaw. naayaway a ngangan: ci Lee minsiong. malimula' a nganganňź ci Minsiong ke. kanatal: Conghuaminko. binacadan: Paywan. nalecu i Taywan Pingtung sian Sici siang. nalecuhan i 1970 a mihcaan 6 a bulad 9 a demiad. kawaw niza: mudadiway, mipalaway, mitelungay, misanga' tu dadiw. misanga' tu palaw. matinengay a kamu: Hulam, Paywan, Taywan. pahezek a cacudadan: Pingtung kawkung. nalimaan: kalimucu' sakapitu . siwkay niza Minsiong i kawcung henay sa, mudadiwtu i Pingtung, Kaosiung. sisa, matinengtu katuuday ku mipalaway a tademaw. nalimaan nu dadiw pulungan a nalimaan:"mududu' tu bulad Ť∑üŤĎóśúąšļģŤĶį"(1999 a mihcaan palekal) teked a nalimaan:"maazih tu cilal ÁúčŤ¶čŚ§™ťôĹ"(2001 a mihcaan)(aci wanposen,Lincyayi,Coyun pulung mudadiw) teked a nalimaan:"sicedamay a luma' ÁĒúŤúúÁöĄŚģ∂"(2008 a mihcaan) adidi'ay a nalimaan:"Less and MoreśįĎťõĄŚ∑īŤźä"(2012 a mihcaan palekal) iga 2008 a mihcaan "kalimucu' sakapitu"(mipalaw ci Malaw) 2012 a mihcaan"pakuyucay a tademaw" 2017 a mihcaan"52 Hz I Love You" tilibi Taywan tilibi(2001 a mihcaan)- u ngangan aku ci Lianhua śąĎÁöĄŚźćŚ≠óŚŹęŤďģŤäĪ Yincumincu tilibi(2005 a mihcaan)- miadupay Yincumincu tilibi(2009 a mihcaan)- misaydan i Lanyu Binawlan tilibi(2009 a mihcaan)- kakasenengan ÁóěŚ≠źŤčĪťõĄ Manamuh tilibi(2010 a mihcaan)- muwa atu kilang Taywan tilibi(2011 a mihcaan)- kakasenengan i umah ÁĒįŚļĄŤčĪťõĄ Manamuh tilibi(2012 a mihcaan)- buyu ŚĪĪRXAY Sanli tilibi(2013 a mihcaan)- maymaw takuwanan ŚįĪśėĮŤ¶ĀšĹ†śĄõšłäśąĎ Sanli tilibi(2014 a mihcaan)- ÁÜĪśĶ∑śąÄś≠Ć limulak tilibi(2015 a mihcaan)-PMAMšĻčśÖĺśúõšŅĪś®āťÉ® Tademaw tilibi(2015 a mihcaan)-śėüŚļßśĄõśÉÖÁ≥ĽŚąó Taywan tilibi(2016 a mihcaan)- ŚŅÖŚčĚÁ∑īÁŅíÁĒü Taywan tilibi(2016 a mihcaan)- ) nalimaan nu mitelungay misalukyaw ku Tuas śźĖśĽĺÁ•ĖťĚą kapah tu TaywanŚŹįÁĀ£ÁúüŚ•ĹŚļ∑ palud ni ina Ś™ĹŚ™ĹÁöĄŚĽöśąŅ tansul sa singangan tuway nuayaway a simpi cacekulan ŚéüŚ§ĘŤąěŚŹį u zuma ku kapah nu palaw Á∂úŤóĚŤŹ≤ŚłłŤģö Á¨¨5~9ťõÜŚä©ÁźÜšłĽśĆĀ

sir~…ĺu nijazu Ē~ °, u pajwan bina ¶adan a tad…ômaw. naajawaj a ŇčaŇčan: ¶i r~…ĺ…ô…ô minsioŇč. mar~…ĺimur~…ĺa Ē~ ° a ŇčaŇčan* ¶i minsioŇč k…ô. kanatar~…ĺ: ¶oŇčńßuaminko. bina ¶adan: pajwan. nar~…ĺ…ô par~…ĺaw. matin…ôŇčaj a kamu: ńßur~…ĺam, pajwan, tajwan. pańß…ôz…ôk a ¶a ¶udadan: piŇčtuŇč kawkuŇč. nar~…ĺimaan: kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° sakapitu . siwkaj niza minsioŇč i kaw ¶uŇč ńß…ônaj sa, mudadiwtu i a nar~…ĺimaan:"r~…ĺ…ôss and mor…ô****"(**** a mińß ¶aan par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ) iga **** a mińß ¶aan "kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° sakapitu"(mipar~…ĺaw ¶i mar~…ĺaw) **** a mińß ¶aan"pakuju ¶aj a tad…ômaw" **** a mińß ¶aan"** ńßz i r~…ĺo*…ô jou" tir~…ĺibi tajwan tir~…ĺibi(**** a mińß ¶aan)- u ŇčaŇčan aku ¶i r~…ĺianńßua ******* jin ¶umin ¶u tir~…ĺibi(**** a mińß ¶aan)- miadupaj jin ¶umin ¶u tir~…ĺibi(**** a mińß ¶aan)- misajdan i r~…ĺanju binawr~…ĺan tir~…ĺibi(**** a mińß ¶aan)- kakas…ôn…ôŇčan **** manamuńß tir~…ĺibi(**** a mińß ¶aan)- muwa atu kir~…ĺaŇč tajwan tir~…ĺibi(**** a mińß ¶aan)- kakas…ôn…ôŇčan i
